name: Trust Bar
description: Responsive reassurance strip for delivery, returns, secure payment and service benefits. Accepts up to five Trust Items.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Trust Bar
attribute_definition_groups.description: Responsive reassurance strip for delivery, returns, secure payment and service benefits. Accepts up to five Trust Items.

attribute_definitions.name: Accessible title
attribute_definitions.description: Optional heading displayed above the benefits. If omitted, add an ARIA label when rendering the component outside Page Designer.

attribute_definitions.name: Desktop columns
attribute_definitions.description: Benefits stack on mobile, use two columns on tablet and this number on desktop.

attribute_definitions.name: Density
attribute_definitions.description: Controls semantic spacing around and between benefits.

attribute_definitions.name: Surface
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic storefront surface applied to the complete trust bar.
